sutta: The Buddha says just as monks in this Jambudīpa rose apple land that is india trifling in number are the pleasant parks the pleasant groves the pleasant grounds and lakes while more numerous other steep precipitous places unfordable rivers dense thickets of stakes and thorns and inaccessible mountains just so few in number are those beings who diseasing as men are reborn among men more numerous are those beings who diseasing as men are reborn in hell who are reborn in the wombs of animals who are reborn in the realm of ghosts just so few in number are those beings who deceasing as men are reborn among the devas more numerous are those beings who deceasing as men are reborn in hell in the wombs of animals in the realm of ghosts few in number are those beings who diseasing as devas are reborn as devas or are reborn as men more numerous are those beings who deceasing as devas are born into the three woeful planes of hell the animal realm and the realm of ghosts similarly few in number are those beings who deceasing from hell or from the animal realm or from the ghost realm are reborn as men or as devas more numerous are those beings who deceasing from hell from the animal realm from the ghost realm are reborn back into the hell realm or in the animal realm or in the ghost realm.
commentary: So basically what this is saying is that most men after they pass away they are not they don't come back into the human realm or go up into the deva realm instead most of them go into the warfoot plains the three woeful planes hell animal realm and the ghost realm similarly devas most of the devas when they pass away are reborn into the woeful plains few of them are reborn backed as devas or as human beings and even the beings from the woeful planes after they pass away most of them are reborn back into the woefu planes and not into the human realm or the heavenly realm now what amount we born it back into the woefu planes for example human beings uh I would give a a very rough estimate perhaps out of every 10 people out of every 10 human beings maybe only two or three yeah come back into the human realm human world or are reborn as devas maybe seven or eight out of ten people go down into the whole food plains so from there we can realize that it is quite uh dangerous uh and uh we should not be like most people most ordinary people now they live a very ordinary life and then they go into the uh woeful planes because they follow their inclinations they follow all their lower instincts it would appear like the number of beings in the in the in the world every world system is like a pyramid you know the higher you go the less beings there are the lower you go the more beings there are the base is very wide the top is very narrow now the other thing here you can see here is that then the woefu planes mentioned here and throughout the suttas are only three you know that is the first one the lowest one is the health realm and slightly above that is the animal realm and and better than the animal realm according to samsuta is the realm of ghosts so there are only three planes of existence in the woefu planes later books added another plane called the asura plane but when we check with the suttas we find that it contradicts the sutta because in the sutta two suttas in the diga nikaya one says that the lowest type of asuras are the kalakanja asuras and then later in another sutta it is stated that the kala kanja asuras are also devas so you can see here that if the lowest kind of asuras are devas then all of the asuras must be devasta so there are only three woeful planes and not four.
